VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is real, confirmed on arXiv under ID 2310.11986, with the exact title and matching authors (Weidinger, Rauh, Marchal, Manzini, Hendricks, Mateos-Garcia, Bergman, Kay, Griffin, Bariach, et al.). The only error in the citation is the ArXiv ID: the reference cited 2310.06682 but the correct ID is 2310.11986.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.11986
